yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_snapconfine__systemdtmpfiles__root_CVE20 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for snap-confine + systemd-tmpfiles = root (CVE-2026-3888)"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-25"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-3888" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: snap-confine + systemd-tmpfiles = root (CVE-2026-3888)"; content:"CVE-2026-3888"; nocase; sid:6797854; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-2072 - Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability in Hitach"; content:"CVE-2026-2072"; nocase; sid:2551003; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-4784 - code-projects Simple Laundry System Paramete"; content:"CVE-2026-4784"; nocase; sid:1161164; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-31381, CVE-2026-31382: Gainsight Assist Information"; content:"CVE-2026-31381"; nocase; sid:2925985; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Breaking the Sound Barrier, Part II: Exploiting CVE-2024-545"; content:"CVE-2024-54529"; nocase; sid:3856678; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
